children.heading: CITES
children.label: 1 CITES
children.text: The term “CITES” means the Convention on International Trade in Endangered Species of Wild Fauna and Flora (27 UST 1087; TIAS 8249).

children.label: A
children.text: protection, restoration, and management of habitats;

children.label: B
children.text: onsite research and monitoring of populations, habitats, annual reproduction, and species population trends;

children.label: C
children.text: assistance in the development, implementation, and improvement of national and regional management plans for habitat ranges;

children.label: i
children.text: to protect and manage populations and habitats; and

children.label: ii
children.text: to prevent illegal trade of marine turtles;

children.label: i
children.text: the illegal killing of marine turtles, freshwater turtles, and tortoises; and

children.label: ii
children.text: illegal trade in marine turtles;

children.label: F
children.text: initiatives to resolve conflicts between humans and marine turtles, freshwater turtles, and tortoises over habitats used by marine turtles, freshwater turtles, and tortoises;

children.label: G
children.text: community outreach and education; and

children.label: H
children.text: strengthening of the ability of local communities to implement population and habitat conservation programs.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The term “freshwater turtle” means any member of the family Carettochelyidae, Chelidae, Chelydridae, Dermatemydidae, Emydidae, Geoemydidae, Kinosternidae, Pelomedusidae, Platysternidae, Podocnemididae, or Trionychidae.

children.label: i
children.text: any part, product, egg, or offspring of a turtle described in subparagraph (A); and

children.label: ii
children.text: a carcass of such a turtle.

children.heading: Fund
children.label: 4 Fund
children.text: The term “Fund” means the Marine Turtle Conservation Fund established by .section 6604 of this title

children.heading: Habitat
children.label: 5 Habitat
children.text: The term “habitat” means any marine turtle, freshwater turtle, or tortoise habitat (including a nesting habitat) that is under the jurisdiction of United States Fish and Wildlife Service programs.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The term “marine turtle” means any member of the family Cheloniidae or Dermochelyidae.

children.label: i
children.text: any part, product, egg, or offspring of a turtle described in subparagraph (A); and

children.label: ii
children.text: a carcass of such a turtle.

children.heading: Multinational Species Conservation Fund
children.label: 7 Multinational Species Conservation Fund
children.text: The term “Multinational Species Conservation Fund” means the fund established under the heading “multinational species conservation fund” in title I of the Department of the Interior and Related Agencies Appropriations Act, 1999 ().16 U.S.C. 4246

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 8 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of the Interior.

children.label: A
children.text: American Samoa;

children.label: B
children.text: the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands;

children.label: C
children.text: the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico;

children.label: D
children.text: Guam;

children.label: E
children.text: the United States Virgin Islands; and

children.label: F
children.text: any other territory or possession of the United States.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The term “tortoise” means any member of the family Testudinidae.

children.label: i
children.text: any part, product, egg, or offspring of a tortoise described in subparagraph (A); and

children.label: ii
children.text: a carcass of such a tortoise.
